title: Device Settings  - Custom button - Teams Not Detected
scenario: Custom button configuration shows "Microsoft Teams Not Detected" modal when Teams is not connected on Falcon headsets
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Scroll to and tap 'Custom Button' or 'Button Configuration'
Assign a custom action (e.g., Play/Pause, Voice Assistant, Hold/Resume Call, ANC/Transparency Mode, or Do Nothing)
expected: When "Microsoft Teams" is selected and Teams is not connected, a modal displays: "Microsoft Teams is not connected. Select Other Providers to assign other custom actions." The user can switch to "Other Providers" and assign custom actions like Play/Pause, Voice Assistant, Hold/Resume Call, ANC/Transparency Mode, or Do Nothing. This feature is available on Falcon headsets.
